betterquesting:10.desc:8:
My journey has been a long one, and often, a lonely one.
I have allies, some of which I can safely call friends, and yet, my Ascension has been a mostly personal journey, one I took, consciously and subconsciously, because I knew that nobody else could walk my steps.
But with this task, this final act of furnace awesomeness, I have a mentor, someone willing to take my hand, and help me through the dark forest of furnace temptations, to bring me into the light of smelting.
From the might of the Sun, comes a furnace like no others, one that, thanks to my mentor, is within my grasp.
